card.text_raw_chs: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于{Energy:energyIcons()}的牌时，获得{DanseMacabrePower:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
card.text_default_chs: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于2能量的牌时，获得3点格挡。
card.text_upgraded_chs: 每当你打出一张耗能大于等于2能量的牌时，获得4点格挡。
card.text_raw_eng: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, gain {DanseMacabrePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
